programme.title: Bobby's Triple Threat
programme.desc: The Titans get the shock of their lives when Bobby Flay's best friend, Iron Chef Michael Symon, enters the Triple Threat kitchen; friendship doesn't stop Bobby from making this a fair fight as Michael faces off with his Achilles' heel ingredient.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: New York City's small but mighty chef Deb Caplan takes on Beantown's Nicholas Lisotto; Scott Conant ("Chopped") teams up with actress and model Olivia Culpo to show Bobby Flay that he is not quite ready for his close-up.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Buffalo chef Mike Andrzejewski and rural but refined chef Anthony Nelson arrive in the big city to duke it out; Food Network stars Eddie Jackson and Damaris Phillips send the winner into the ring with chef Flay.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Damaris Phillips and Amanda Freitag team up to take down their good friend, Bobby Flay; they bring in Japanese cuisine master Shota Nakajima and chef Jamie Gwen to dish up a mean victory.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: "The Kitchen" co-host Sunny Anderson and world traveler Andrew Zimmern join forces to beat chef Bobby Flay, handpicking Brooklyn's finest Jared Forman and Italian master chef Fabio Viviani to deliver the win.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Country music superstar Martina McBride and chef Alex Guarnaschelli jam with chefs Drew Erickson and Aristide Williams to tune Bobby Flay up.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Chefs Anne Burrell and Eddie Jackson bring the noise as chefs Jessica Yarr and Matthew Zafrir bring the flavor to dump Bobby Flay in a pierogi battle.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Fashion icon Carson Kressley and pastry chef Stephanie Boswell zhuzh up chefs Chris Infinger and Kevin Lee and prepare them for victory over Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Sunny Anderson and Scott Conant team up with chefs Maryam Ghaznavi and Deepak Kaul to school Bobby Flay in new worlds of flavor.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Josh Capon and Today's Dylan Dreyer fire up Bobby Flay's grill with pitmasters Matt Abdoo and Dominique Leach.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Stage and screen actor Josh Gad duets with Damaris Phillips to turn out Bobby Flay's lights while preparing chefs Ciaran McGoldrick and Josh Mouzakes for their big debut.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Brooke Williamson and actor Randall Park recruit chefs Marcos Spaziani and Richard Van Lê to teach Bobby Flay a thing or two about a tricky signature dish.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay offers his support to The Verdict, a restaurant known for serving traditional New Orleans cuisine with a modern and trendy twist.

programme.desc: A well-liked, retired couple ask Ramsay to help their son, who has taken over their restaurant, Nino's, in Long Beach, Calif.

programme.desc: Alex Guarnaschelli and James Austin Johnson leave a lasting impression on Bobby Flay as he tries to beat chefs Stephanie Cmar and David Standridge.

programme.desc: Katie Lee Biegel and actor Nicholas Braun taunt Bobby Flay with a couple of young chefs, Hanna Haar and Peter McQuaid, who are gunning for the win.

programme.title: Freedom to Leave the House! Inogen Portable Oxygen
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Tournament of Champions
programme.sub-title: Leave It All on the Floor
programme.desc: In the final four battles of the first round, Guy Fieri welcomes Chopped judge Amanda Freitag to face off against qualifier winner Carlos Anthony; in the last battle of the round, qualifier winner David Viana takes on former finalist Tobias Dorzon.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Ultimate Baking Championship
programme.desc: Jesse Palmer challenges the seven remaining chefs to find inspiration in grab-and-go gas station snacks; the bakers create their own interpretation of a classic dessert, like an opera cake or a Sachertorte, for judges Duff Goldman and Zac Young.

programme.title: The Ultimate Baking Championship
programme.desc: Jesse Palmer tasks the bakers with creating a visually stunning chocolate sculptural piece along with a complementary baked element; chocolatier Amaury Guichon joins Duff Goldman to judge the chefs' technical precision and creative storytelling.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Ramsay travels to Woodland Park, Colo., to save Mangia Mangia, an Italian restaurant saddled with tension between the owner and her staff, and problems with the food, atmosphere and service.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Ramsay travels to Woodland Park, Colo., to save Mangia Mangia, an Italian restaurant saddled with tension between the owner and her staff, and problems with the food, atmosphere and service.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Ramsay helps the owners of Old Neighborhood in Arvada, Colo., transform their restaurant.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares
programme.desc: Gordon steps in to help transform Diwan, an established Indian restaurant that is also running a Mexican restaurant out of the same kitchen.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's hittin' up joints crushin' all kinds of flavor; there's a Malaysian oasis in Cincinnati and a Salvadorian spot in Port Chester, N.Y., each serving their real deal cultural specialties; a bus in Omaha goes Detroit-style with their pizza.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: In Richmond is a jammin' Jamaican joint serving outrageous oxtail and fried chicken with true island flavor; in Reno is a sandwich spot going loco with the bird and putting a unique twist on the breakfast burrito.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri hits the road for serious sammys; a vegan joint in New Jersey plates plant-based perfection, TOC champ Tiffani Faison brings Southern barbecue to Boston and a family spot in California mixes it up with lights-out lamb.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri heads back to some spots for great recipes; he snags over the top arepas at a Venezuelan spot in Norwalk, island-inspired chicken wings at a Hawaiian outpost in Mesa, and kebabs from an Afghan joint in Dallas.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Mac 'n' cheese burger; quahogs stuffed with chorizo; two-finger punch drink.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: In Culver City, Gene Simmons from Kiss visits a hangout serving Hawaiian dishes; in Garden Grove, tamales and beef chamorro; in Monterey, oysters and a pasta-seafood medley.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri digs into regional flavors where you may not expect to find them, like Cajun jambalaya in Bend, Ore.; Pakistani oxtail in Chehalis, Wash.; a tiki joint in Houston serves elevated dumplings and honey butter chicken biscuits.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's filling up on fresh-and-funky flavors, starting with scratch-made pasta in Chicago; a Missoula, MT, spot is getting creative with a banh mi burger; a pair of brothers is serving up craveable crab cakes and corn fritters in Florida.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is tasting everything from pasta to pescatarian grub; Vanilla Ice takes Guy to an Ecuadorian joint in Miami for standout ceviche; in Minnesota, a former DJ mixes it up with his take on scratch-made pasta and poutine.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diving into scratch-made specialties; in Houston, there's a real-deal Italian pasta, plus a funky joint is putting out pizza topped with a surprising combo; a scenic spot in Hawaii is cooking up a comforting chicken pot pie.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri starts at a Vietnamese spot in Albuquerque, N.M., with banh mi; in Anchorage, Alaska, there's real Italian deli.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.sub-title: On the Hook and in the Bun
programme.desc: A beer-lover's spot in Seattle serves fish and chips and the bomb beef dip; a local Hawaiian gem dishes out fresh-catch curry and a primo poke burger; a Chinese emporium in San Francisco cooks up lobster, pork buns and even dim sum chicken feet.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.sub-title: Triple D Nation: Breakfast, Burgers and Bison
programme.desc: Guy Fieri checks in with top-notch Triple-D spots, starting with a s'mores French toast tower in Boston; a Duluth café is going strong with braised bison, and an old-school joint in Indiana is cranking out outrageous sausage gravy burgers.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy heads to Fairbanks for an Alaskan culinary adventure; authentic German specialties at a super funky food truck; a food-and-music jam fest; Cuban favorites; meatball subs.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Bend, Ore., where a funky spot stuffs their buns with unexpected flavors; a Puerto Rican oasis in Utah cooks real deal mofongo, and a Nashville joint serves coal-fired pizza.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's having a sandwich extravaganza at a lunch spot in Indianapolis that is serving up serious flavors with the-bomb brisket au jus and rockin' roast pork.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.sub-title: Triple D Nation: Sweet, Spicy and Savory
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's headed back for sweet, spicy and savory favorites; he finds top-tier tenderloin and honey biscuits in Memphis; killer coconut curry goat stew in Boston; and prime-time Parmesan chicken with potato croquettes in New York.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's starting at a South Bound Brook, N.J., meat market and stacking up their spin on the sloppy joe; in Nashville, Tenn., a taco joint is piling nachos with local flavor; a down-home spot is serving the bomb barbecue pork mac.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's grabbing seaside snacks, global spice and Southern soul; in Georgia, a Tybee Island joint goes gourmet with hot dogs, while a Savannah soul food spot rolls out an oxtail twist; in Idaho, a Boise café serves up a taste of Afghanistan.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri checks out the Phoenix food scene and visits an Irish pub that incorporates Southwestern style; he explores a family joint that serves smoke and spice wood-fired pizza and a neighborhood taqueria that aims to redefine Mexican street food.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe grabs dessert for breakfast at the Florida State Fair with the Wake-Up Waffle Pizza; he checks out the Washington Spring State Fair for poké wrapped in seaweed cones and the bloom-filled Rochester Lilac Festival for creamy Pizza Mac.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes his taste buds on an international tour with loaded Banh Mi Fries at the Taste of Omaha, the beef-loaded Birria Torta at the Rochester Lilac Festival and a Southern take on a classic lasagna at the West Virginia Strawberry Festival.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh celebrates the Lunar New Year with a Chinese-inspired feast that includes saucy orange chicken, peanut-buttery pork, Dan Dan noodles, and lucky baloney egg rolls.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: It is Bernie's tie-dye birthday party, and Molly Yeh is celebrating her tutu-loving daughter with a tie-dye tutu birthday cake; she's loading up the snack table with swirly yogurt queso with cilantro cream, little bean burritos and tiny taco salads.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh packs the hungry beet farmers a hearty meal of pulled pork sandwiches with charred broccoli slaw and a side of beet chips with French onion yogurt; for a sweet treat, she adds her thick frosted speculoos cookie bars and s'mores puppy chow.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: Molly Yeh whips up a smorgasbord of delightful Swedish-inspired foods, like sweet rose semlor buns, savory Swedish meatballs and a big green salad with tiny Hasselback potatoes and horseradish dressing; she stacks up a Smorgastarta sandwich cake.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: It's wheat harvest time, and it is time to make a tasty wheat truck lunch for two. Crispy fried chicken Banh Mi sandwiches, a side of salt and vinegar potato salad, a savory miso broccoli grain salad, and a tart pickled plum crumble.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.sub-title: Nap Time Meal Done Juuust Right!
programme.desc: Molly Yeh makes a delicious dinner during naptime; she sneaks away to prepare Slow Cooker Asian Wedding Soup, one-Dish Salmon and Veggies, Tamagoyaki and a Red Bean Snacking Cake with Yogurt Glaze.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond cooks up social media marvels, trying her hand at a three sauce baked spaghetti, shortcut lazy red and green enchiladas, easy garlic butter bath biscuits and spicy bacon pickle bites.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond stocks the freezer with some all-time favorites, including her easy pineapple pork shoulder and a hearty slow simmered beef ragu; she prepares heat-and-go sweet and savory breakfast wraps and decadent shortcut brownie ice cream bites.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Broccoli chicken and cheese soup, outrageously cheesy creamy sage baked ravioli, meatless cauliflower parm, hazelnut hot chocolate made in the slow cooker.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond shares family news while cooking for her kids; she makes Orange Chicken and Peppers for Paige and a French Onion Casserole for Alex to have after her baby is born; there are Totally Terrific Cookies and Sloppy Joes To Go for the boys.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: The Kitchen diner dishes out ultimate comfort food classics, including Alex Guarnaschelli's indulgent Western Omelet Stuffed Peppers, Sunny Anderson's fired-up Disco Inferno Tots and Geoffrey Zakarian's flavorful Baklava Toast with Cottage Cheese.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Be My Guest With Ina Garten
programme.desc: Musician Jon Batiste joins Ina Garten for a conversation about staying strong and making Grammy history; Ina makes peanut butter and jelly bars for a taste of nostalgia and Jon shares his Ma's Louisiana-style red beans and rice.

programme.title: Be My Guest With Ina Garten
programme.desc: Designer Daniel Roseberry spends the day with Ina Garten, sharing fashion secrets and flower arrangements, after Ina bakes a Tri-Berry Ricotta Cake for breakfast; then, Ina teaches Daniel how to make smashed burgers with caramelized onions.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's digging into dishes with and without meat; in Mobile, AL, there's rabbit, while in Omaha, NE, a vegan joint brings a meatless spin to fried chicken; in Stamford, CT, Guy and sportscaster Dan Patrick chow down on Greek.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri grabs fistfuls of flavor at a California spot bringing next-level Mediterranean to the West Coast; a New Jersey bistro by the beach slings herbaceous octopus, and an Indianapolis Argentine joint fires up chimichurri chorizo.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's grabbing creative flavor combos that pack a punch; a NYC couple is bringing Greek grub to Naples, FL; a Dallas spot is serving over-the-top pork belly lollipops; a Triple-G winner is putting out next-level ramen in Chicago.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's rolling out with a little holy moly in New Hampshire, where a joint is puttin' out bomb bagels; in North Carolina, a funky spot is adding a Southern spin to egg rolls; a fun Florida chef is goin' prime time with pastrami and pizza.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
